_comment: Schema: bindings = flat key→value map for {expr} and input_* placeholder resolution.
fanout = owner_name → list of binding-override dicts; each override produces one resolved file.
Dates: remit_date=2026-04-30, fctrdt=2026-05-01 (1st of remit month), fctrdt_1m=2026-04-01 (prior month 1st), pre_month_end=2026-03-31.
